title: Vegeta 20XX is having a bad day
display_title: Vegeta 20XX is having a bad day
wikitext:
[]: Post by Vegeta 20XX » Sat Dec 27, 2008 6:02 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: At topic: Yes, yes she was since Asuka > Rei personality-wise and attractiveness. (though Misato is the winner to any and all Asuka vs Rei debates. ;) )

[]: Post by Hunter21 » Sat Dec 27, 2008 7:28 am @Topic. No, Asuka was not fetish fuel. I was entranced by redheads long before Eva was even created. In fact I still think Sadamoto/Anno screwed up by giving her blue eyes instead of green. Oh and also... Don't bump dying threads just to troll.

[]: Post by Vegeta 20XX » Sat Dec 27, 2008 7:40 am Eh, I've been on a "bitch at everything" spree today. Looking at the Mugen Fighters Guild forums illustrates this perfectly.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Dec 27, 2008 11:02 am Trolling threads and sassing the staff & other members gets you nowhere. A wise man once wrote, "Get your inner 2 year old under control." (Also: you just banned yourself from that IRC channel for 2 weeks instead of 3 days.)

[]: Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Sat Dec 27, 2008 2:57 pm Vegeta 20XX wrote: This coming from Sailor Fucking Star Dust, the overlord of the S/A overlords.

[]: Post by slothen » Sat Dec 27, 2008 4:38 pm Vegeta 20XX wrote: Eh, I've been on a "bitch at everything" spree today. Looking at the Mugen Fighters Guild forums illustrates this perfectly.

[]: Post by Dartz » Sat Dec 27, 2008 4:48 pm Why don't you dress up in a Santa costume and take out your aggressions on some New Years party. Insult teh SSD and get Make Sky News with your an heroic rampage and all is forgiven
